nasb.text: If anyone does not obey our instruction in this letter, take special note of that person and do not associate with him, so that he will be put to shame.

esv.text: If anyone does not obey what we say in this letter, take note of that person, and have nothing to do with him, that he may be ashamed.

cnv.text: 如果有人不聽從我們這封信上的訓勉，要把這個人記下來，不可和他來往，好叫他自己覺得慚愧。

ccb.text: 如果有人不听从这信上的教导，要注意提防他，不要和他来往，好使他羞愧。

csbs.text: 如果有人不顺从我们这信上的话语，你们就要记住这个人，不可与他交往，好让他感到羞愧；
